source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/1. DHF/27. PP 완료 보고서/PP 문제점 검토_260312.pptx

document.title: PP 문제점 검토
document.documentType: PP problem review presentation / DHF design-manufacturing-quality review

sourceSummary.oneLine: CYAN PP issue review summarizing manufacturing, quality, and development problems, corrective actions, owners, and target completion status.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR PP completion review by documenting production-process, inspection, software, firmware, waterproofing, tolerance, noise, imaging, and component-control issues and corrective actions.
keyPoints: The review is dated 2026-03-12 and covers manufacturing, quality, and development departments.
Several PP findings require consultation or future planning, including Carbon Top Sheet attachment, GDX Sheet marking, waterproof rating, F/W upload, and Back Deco Sheet label area.
Quality review states the Cyan Model does not satisfy IP44 under the design structure, with discussion completed to delete the IP item from MRT/PRT because of cost impact.
Software and imaging findings include AED mode image acquisition, Hand S/W use in AED mode, full FT inspection workload, calibration loss, saturation handling, and ghost image issues.
Mechanical and supplier-control findings include sheet sizing, cushion/pad marking, FPCB length, cable damage, stiffener standardization, torque-tool management, and tolerance corrections.

concepts.name: PP issue corrective action tracking
concepts.evidence: PP 진행간 문제점 개선 활동 (종합) 진행현황 lists completed, consultation-needed, in-progress, and plan-needed items.

concepts.name: IP44 waterproof rating gap
concepts.evidence: Cyan Model is stated not to satisfy IP44 under the design structure.

concepts.name: AED mode imaging validation
concepts.evidence: FT inspection and AED mode findings include image acquisition failure, Hand S/W use, full inspection workload, calibration loss, and saturation behavior.

concepts.name: GATE PBA noise specification
concepts.evidence: Noise after repair is recorded as average 0.9 against a specification of 1.0 or below.

concepts.name: Firmware upload process ownership
concepts.evidence: IMAX Module F/W upload process requires departmental consultation.

concepts.name: Supplier stiffener standardization
concepts.evidence: IC stiffener size and attachment method require standardization with supplier control.

evidence.claim: The PP issue review document is dated 2026-03-12 and involves manufacturing, quality, and development departments.
evidence.evidenceText: PP 문제점 검토 일자 - 2026. 03. 12 부서 - 제조, 품질, 개발

evidence.claim: The overall PP issue list includes items needing consultation for Carbon Top Sheet attachment, GDX Sheet marking, waterproof rating, F/W upload, and Back Deco Sheet label attachment.
evidence.evidenceText: 협의 필요 ... Carbon Top Sheet 부착 1건, GDX Sheet 표식 1건, 방수 등급 1건, F/W 업로드 1건, Back Deco Sheet의 라벨 부착부 1건

evidence.claim: GATE PBA resistor misplacement increased noise, and repair confirmed noise improvement to an average of 0.9 against a specification of 1.0 or below.
evidence.evidenceText: GATE PBA B'd 시정수 저항 2point 오삽으로 인한 노이즈증가; 노이즈값 개선 확인 (스펙: 1.0 이하 / 실제 평균 0.9)

evidence.claim: The GATE PBA time constant change was completed and applied to mass production.
FT inspection initially had no image acquisition in AED mode, and software was modified to allow inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: FT 검사 진행 시 AED 모드에서 영상 미취득; 소프트웨어 수정하여 검사 가능하도록 변경; 담당 Solution 개발 (박재홍) 완료

evidence.claim: AED mode Hand S/W use was improved by program modification and marked complete.
evidence.evidenceText: AED 모드 영상 촬영 시 Hand S/W 사용 불가; 프로그램 수정하여 AED 모드에서 Hand S/W 사용 하도록 개선필요; 담당 Solution 개발 (박재홍) 완료

evidence.claim: Full FT image acquisition was optimized so each mode needs 22 images rather than larger AED/Normal mode image sets.
evidence.evidenceText: AED 모드 영상 Dark 10/Bright 50장, Normal 모드 Dark 10/Bright 50장; Ex) Manual Mode 22장 / AED Mode 22장; 완료

evidence.claim: The Cyan Model is reported as not satisfying IP44 due to the design structure.
evidence.evidenceText: Cyan Model은 HAD1717MC의 대체품으로 개발되었으나, 설계 구조상 IP44 등급을 만족하지 않는 것으로 확인됨

evidence.claim: MRT and PRT review discussions completed deletion of the IP item due to cost increase factors.
evidence.evidenceText: MRT 및 PRT 검토 시 IP 부분 삭제 논의 완료 (단가 상승 요인)

evidence.claim: IMAX Module firmware upload work process ownership remained under consultation.
evidence.evidenceText: IMAX Module F/W 업로드 작업 공정 협의 필요; F/W 업로드 업무 부서 협의 필요 사항

evidence.claim: IC stiffener size and attachment method require standardization due to incorrect attachment affecting connector engagement position.
evidence.evidenceText: IC 스태프너 Size 및 부착 방법에 대한 표준화 필요; 스패프너 오부착으로 인해 Connector 체결 위치 상이

evidence.claim: The IC supplier is expected to supply TI ICs with stiffeners attached, but stiffener position or size variation was observed.
evidence.evidenceText: TI IC 공급사에서 STIFFENER 부착 공급; 부착된 STIFFENER 위치 or 사이즈 상이

evidence.claim: Indicator Module Cover and Body Frame fit issues were caused by specification out-of-tolerance conditions and required tolerance criterion revision.
evidence.evidenceText: Indicator Module Cover 상대물 (Body Frame) 형합부분이 Spec out 되어 조립이 안되는 현상 발생; 허용 공차 관리기준 수정 필요

evidence.claim: Drawing tolerance table alignment and tolerance range mismatch were attributed to Creo-to-AutoCAD conversion error and were manually corrected.
evidence.evidenceText: 도면 표준 공차 테이블 정렬 및 공차 범위 재검토 필요; CREO에서 Auto CAD 변환에 발생한 오류; Auto CAD 도면 오류부분 수작업 수정 완료

evidence.claim: AED mode repeated imaging caused calibration correction to be released, with saturation testing and sample testing planned through 2026-03-27.
evidence.evidenceText: AED Mode 영상 촬영시 Cal 보정이 풀리는 현상 발생; Saturation test 후 수치 선정; 시료별 test 진행 예정; 진행 중 (~03/27)

evidence.claim: Saturation was not applied in the result file from the 10.2 mAs range onward, although the raw file showed normal saturation handling.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.2mAs 구간부터 Saturation 처리가 되지 않음; raw file에서는 정상적으로 Saturation 처리 되었으나, result file에는 처리되지 않음

evidence.claim: A ghost image issue occurred during Pelvis exposure at 60 kV, 320 mA, 6.4 mAs, with panel and TI ROIC driving improvements in progress through 2026-03-31.
evidence.evidenceText: Ghost 현상 발생; Pelvis 60kV 320mA 6.4mAs 촬영시 Cal 보정 풀림 및 Ghost 현상 발생; Panel, TI ROIC 구동 개선 중; 진행 중 (~03/31)

evidence.claim: Development added five AED sensors for initial mass production to secure field stability, with later reduction to one sensor after field stabilization.
evidence.evidenceText: 초기 양산에는 AED Sensor 5개 모두 구현하도록 안정성 확보; 필드 안정 후 1개로 축소

evidence.claim: A simple incoming inspection jig for the POE module was planned for mass-production incoming inspection and was in progress through 2026-03-23.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사 간이지그 제작; 양산 POE 모듈 입고 시 지그 제공; 진행 중 (~03/23)

reviewFlags.reason: Document has inconsistent 작성일 values across slides, including 2025-02-26, 2026-03-09, and 2026-03-12.
Waterproofing is a regulatory/safety-relevant unresolved design decision: the chunk states Cyan does not satisfy IP44 and IP deletion was discussed for MRT/PRT.

Several quality/performance issues were still in progress at the time of the review, including calibration loss, saturation result-file handling, ghost image mitigation, cable review, and POE incoming inspection jig.
No formal external regulatory submission, certification number, notified body, or authority correspondence is present in this chunk.
